revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八専]]
'''Hassen''' (八専) is one of the {{ill|Selection Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selection Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}}.
The {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Sexagenary cycle}} from {{ill|Renzi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renzi|qq=}} (49th in the cycle, counted from {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|qid=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}) to {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (60th) contains 8 days where the elements of the stem and branch match within the {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}: {{ill|Renzi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renzi|qq=}}, {{ill|Jiayin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiayin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}, {{ill|Yimao|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yimao|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Dingsi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingsi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Jimao|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jimao|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kōshin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Because these 8 days fall within the 12-day period from Renzi to Guihai, they are collectively known as Hassen.
When assigning {{ill|Wu Xing|ja|五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}} to the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches, there are a total of 12 days where the energies align. However, 8 of these days fall within the 12-day period from Renzi to Guihai, making this period significant<ref>The remaining 4 days are {{ill|Wuchen|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchen|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (5th in the cycle, Earth-Earth), {{ill|Jichou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (26th, Earth-Earth), {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (35th, Earth-Earth), and {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (43rd, Fire-Fire).</ref>. This overlap of energies is called "Sen'itsu" (専一), and since it occurs on 8 days, it is referred to as "Hassen."
Within the Hassen period, there are 4 days where the energies do not align, known as "Hassen Mabihi" (八専の間日). The remaining 8 days (excluding the Mabihi) are said to amplify fortune if positive and misfortune if negative, a concept known as {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}. However, over time, only the negative connotations were emphasized, and today, these are generally considered unlucky days. Unlike {{ill|Jippōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jippōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405067}}, the Mabihi days are not influenced by Hassen.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Hassen Days''' |- ! Number !! Stem-Branch !! Wu Xing !! Type |- |49 |{{ill|Renzi|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renzi|qq=}} |Water-Water | |- |50 |{{ill|Guichou|ja|1=Yin Water Ox|2=ja|癸丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guichou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Water-Earth |Mabihi |- |51 |{{ill|Jiayin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiayin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} |Wood-Wood | |- |52 |{{ill|Yimao|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yimao|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Wood-Wood | |- |53 |{{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Fire-Earth |Mabihi |- |54 |{{ill|Dingsi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingsi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Fire-Fire | |- |55 |{{ill|Wuwu|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuwu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Earth-Fire |Mabihi |- |56 |{{ill|Jimao|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jimao|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Earth-Earth | |- |57 |{{ill|Kōshin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |Metal-Metal | |- |58 |{{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Metal-Metal | |- |59 |{{ill|Renxu|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|壬戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renxu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Water-Earth |Mabihi |- |60 |{{ill|Guihai|ja|1=Yin Water Pig|2=ja|癸亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guihai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |Water-Water | |}

{{translated page|ja|八専|version=86834575|comment=Imported full ja history}}
